indications.text:
COMTAN is indicated as an adjunct to levodopa / carbidopa to treat patients with
idiopathic Parkinson’s Disease who experience the signs and symptoms of end-of-dose “wearing-off”
(see CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY: Clinical Trials).
COMTAN’s effectiveness has not been systematically evaluated in patients wi...

Comtan (entacapone) is indicated as an adjunct to levodopa/carbidopa to treat patients with idiopathic
Parkinson’s Disease who experience the signs and symptoms of end-of-dose “wearing-off” (see
CLINICAL PHARMACOLOGY, Clinical Studies).
Comtan’s effectiveness has not been systematically evaluated in...
